input.command:
python3 -c "
import json
# Search Jan 25-26 articles for Champions League, Fury, Epstein, Super Bowl, AO
keywords = ['Champions League', 'playoff draw', 'Fury', 'Epstein', 'Super Bowl', 'NFC', 'AFC', 'Australian Open', 'semifinal', 'Grammy', 'South Sudan', 'Netanyahu visit', 'West Africa political parties', 'Bisan Owda', 'skiing crash', 'Cummins replacement']
for day in ['25', '26']:
    fn = f'articles/2026/01/{day}/articles.jsonl'
    try:
        with open(fn) as f:
            for line in f:
                d = json.loads(line)
                title = d.get('title','') or ''
                for kw in keywords:
                    if kw.lower() in title.lower():
                        print(f'[Jan {day}] {title[:130]} | {d.get(\"source\",\"\")}')
                        break
    except: pass
" 2>&1 | head -30

import json
with open('articles/2026/01/26/articles.jsonl') as f:
    for line in f:
        d = json.loads(line)
        title = d.get('title','') or ''
        if any(kw in title.lower() for kw in ['nfl', 'super bowl', 'nfc', 'afc', 'championship', 'conference', 'seahawks', 'rams', 'broncos', 'darnold']):
            print(f'{title[:130]} | {d.get(\"source\",\"\")}')
" 2>&1 | head -20
